title: Garud Puran
desc: A religious leader delivers a detailed discourse on the teachings of the Garuda Purana and imparts essential wisdom to the devotees.

desc: A renowned astrologer predicts the future of people based on their horoscopes and explains the effects of planetary transitions on their birth charts.

desc: The host provides detailed insights into Odisha's religious events and rituals.
